tweets.text:
90% of the time, it's not Meta's fault.

It's urs:
> Ur hook is weak and people scroll past in 0.3 seconds
> Landing page loads in 8 seconds (they bounced at 3)
> PDP looks dropshipped with stolen product photos
> Checkout flow has 6 steps and asks for their blood type

Brother,

People will panic over a 2.1 ROAS.

Then ignore the fact their:

1/ CVR is up 18%
2/ AOV increased $14
3/ Returning customer rate doubled

U know what a 2.1 ROAS with those numbers means?

Ur building an actual brand with real retention.

Not just burning cash on one-time buyers

A lot of founders think their business has a sales problem.

When in reality, they have an expectation problem.

They overpromise.
Under-explain.
Don't educate the client properly.

Then act surprised when people are frustrated later.

tweets.text:
Are there ANY saas companies who run a really strong performance marketing machine?  

Thinking multi-channel ads here.

Who does this really well?

What he said.

I see too many founders optimizing towards top line growth "SCALE BRO!!" instead of maximizing free cash into their pockets.

Over the last 8 years I've made almost as much money from my investments compounding than I did from my first 2 exits.

If the average person can use AI to get their work done in half the time. 

Do they use the rest to do more work?

Or

Do they just take more time for other things?

Outside of entrepreneurs, I think most people choose to take the free time.
